Abhishek Sharma Draws High Praise From Kris Srikkanth After Match-Winning T20 Knock

Jan 23, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Abhishek Sharma Draws High Praise From Kris Srikkanth After Match-Winning T20 Knock

Abhishek Sharma praise reached new heights after the young Indian batter delivered a sensational performance that impressed former India captain Kris Srikkanth. Following his match-winning innings in the T20 encounter, Abhishek’s fearless approach and technical maturity became the talking point across the cricketing world.
